next_tasks.title: Extract top 5 MVP requirements from existing noetfield markdown into os/plan.json done criteria
done_criteria: MVP requirement #1: Pre-execution governance evaluation must return a clear allow/deny/review decision before external execution (sources: PRODUCT_TRUTH.md, PRODUCT_BRIEF.md).

MVP requirement #2: Every evaluated intent must produce immutable audit-ready traceability with RID and exportable compliance evidence (sources: PRODUCT_TRUTH.md, docs/strategy/noetfield-future-path.md).

MVP requirement #3: Product scope must explicitly exclude payment initiation, custody, settlement, routing, FX, and money transmission claims (sources: PRODUCT_TRUTH.md, docs/strategy/noetfield-future-path.md).

MVP requirement #4: Pilot surface must support regulated-organization workflows (bank/copilot readiness) without execution rights, emphasizing policy checks and reviewability (source: docs/strategy/noetfield-future-path.md).

MVP requirement #5: Boundary integrity must be enforced in product narrative and verification, including zero TrustField/VIRLUX scope mixing in Noetfield delivery (sources: docs/strategy/noetfield-future-path.md, PROJECT_BOUNDARIES_LOCKED.md).

verify.command:
python3 - <<'PY'
import json
from pathlib import Path
p=Path('/workspace/os/plan.json')
data=json.loads(p.read_text())
t=data['next_tasks'][0]
assert t['status']=='done'
assert len(t['done_criteria'])==5
print('verify_passed: true')
print('criteria_count:', len(t['done_criteria']))
PY
